backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature report listing autoplay audio changes and fallback behavior tied to BackgroundAudioManager.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries for many frontend files describing their roles in the app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base file defining color variables for light/dark themes and global styling.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing all site sections, global background effects, and audio manager.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Handles autoplaying chainsaw audio with clown-laugh fallback and gesture-based retry logic with no UI.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable layout wrapper providing section structure, titles, subtitles, and separators.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Footer with extreme haunt warning and attribution block.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Sticky header with logo, scroll-based styling, and responsive navigation with mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Renders the auditions section with dates, times, and a list of casting roles, including badges and detailed descriptions for select roles.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Displays an interior elevation image of Clown Town with descriptive text inside a styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Shows food booth cards with images, pricing alerts, descriptions, and menu details using data from content files.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Renders a grid of haunted house attraction cards with images, descriptions, scenes, and wait-time info.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Defines the homepage hero with background imagery, branding, and a button that scrolls to the auditions section.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Displays a procession preview with an image and description highlighting the 6pm parade event.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Provides operating hours, ticket info, passes, and rules in a series of informational cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Renders a section listing merch shops with cards showing name, items, and price, plus a concluding note card.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Displays scare zones using cards with generated images, names, taglines, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Shows a teaser for 2027 with two upcoming haunted houses, each displayed in a detailed card layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Simple teaser section with a card announcing more content coming soon.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: Provides layered fixed-position background effects including gradients, noise, and scanlines for a horror theme.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Defines detailed content for multiple themed food booths, including names, taglines, descriptions, and menus.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Maps haunted houses, scare zones, and food booths to their corresponding generated image asset paths.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Contains haunted house data with names, taglines, descriptions, scenes, and a location note.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Provides a small list of merch shops with item descriptions, prices, and a general note.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Lists scare zones with names, taglines, and detailed descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refetching dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements a React context/provider and hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including loading, login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom horror-themed color variables plus utility classes like radial gradients and bloody text effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, setting up React Query and wrapping the root component with the Internet Identity provider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, custom OKLCH color tokens, extended shadows, animations, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, requirements, architectural notes, known issues, and the current website feature set/state.
